to: make payments to assist individuals in paying relevant charges or fees
make payments to assist individuals in paying relevant charges or fees

conditions.text: the individual satisfies such conditions as regards his financial resources as may be set out in the regulations
the activity in which the individual is required to take part is provided to him in England or Wales

to: receive assistance for an activity provided in England

conditions.text: it is provided by a person who is for the time being approved by the Secretary of State as a provider of activities required by an activity direction or condition

to: receive assistance for an activity provided in Wales

conditions.text: it is provided by a person who is for the time being approved by the National Assembly for Wales as a provider of activities required by an activity direction or condition
